race.comment: SPIRITUALISTIC (8) scored a tough win over this track and trip two-back, then outclassed with a tiring sixth over 1450m at Illawarra Grange. No shock to see her play a leading role. JACKPOT STAR (2) capable on his day and had genuine excuses from the poor draw at Wagga last start. Back in class and stays in the mix. OMNIC (7) was In the money two starts back at Orange but couldn't back that up when unplaced over 1500m at Goulburn last time. Well placed here and gets a chance to feature. LONDON STAR (13) has been in work for quite a while. Came from a wide gate and could only manage to finish sixth last time out over 1425m at Moruya. Draws a better marble this time and worth consideration.
